segments.text: I will sing of the steadfast love of the LORD, forever; with my mouth I will make known your faithfulness to all generations.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: Maschil: or, A Psalm for Ethan the Ezrahite, to give instruction
to all generations: Heb. to generation and generation
heading: A Maskil of Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: For I said, 'Steadfast love will be built up forever; in the heavens you will establish your faithfulness.'
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You crushed Rahab like a carcass;
you scattered your enemies with your mighty arm.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: thy strength: Heb. the arm of thy strength

segments.text: For our shield belongs to the LORD, our king to the Holy One of Israel.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: the LORD our shield: or, our shield is of the LORD, and our king is of the Holy One of Israel

segments.text: Once for all I have sworn by my holiness; I will not lie to David.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: that I lie: Heb. if I lie

segments.text: Blessed be the LORD forever! Amen and Amen.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
